# BBQ Grill — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> BBQ Grill (www.bbq-grill.co.il) is an Israeli online store specializing in BBQ grills and related equipment. The user wants a complete visual redesign with a bold, eye-catching aesthetic featuring fade/blur effects, 3D scroll-based animations and objects, and an overall premium immersive shopping experience that showcases all existing products in a dramatically improved layout.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About BBQ Grill
BBQ Grill (www.bbq-grill.co.il) is an Israeli online store specializing in BBQ grills and related equipment. The user wants a complete visual redesign with a bold, eye-catching aesthetic featuring fade/blur effects, 3D scroll-based animations and objects, and an overall premium immersive shopping experience that showcases all existing products in a dramatically improved layout.

## Target Audience
- שפים מקצועיים
- חובבי גריל
- מארחים ביתיים

## Industry
ציוד מנגל וגריל

- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
